subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest towards the Most Exalted Horizon! Hearken unto the Call of the Lord of Creation, for verily He draweth thee unto a station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الافق الاعلی ان استمع ندآء مالک الوری انه یجذبک الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @wisdom [hikmat], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
